title: jasminum multiflorum f. pubescens
intro: Jasminum multiflorum f. pubescens is a variety of flowering plant, commonly known as the pubescent star jasmine or Himalayan jasmine. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality. Jasminum multiflorum f. pubescens is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote overall well-being and improve mental health.
